extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won the sprint in Qinzhou from JAKOBSEN Fabio and GROENEWEGEN Dylan after a five-rider break was absorbed on final lap.
tactical_patterns: COVANHA Remi targeted intermediate sprint bonus seconds twice successfully, tactical pattern for GC positioning before mountain stages.
Lotto-Jumbo kept break on short leash entire stage, controlling without burning sprinter support team despite treacherous wet conditions.

rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: abandoned stage two, ending BMC career prematurely in adverse weather conditions
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: fourth World Tour win of 2018 demonstrates emerging elite sprint consistency against established names
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: neutral: held overall lead but lost sprint shows form maintaining rather than peaking
